features.name: delayed non-blocking assignment to array element inside for loop
features.description: Code should include a for loop that performs a delayed non-blocking assignment (using #delay syntax) to an array element in each iteration, triggering BLKLOOPINIT unsupported error

features.name: for loop with iteration count at or above default unroll threshold
features.description: Code should include a for loop whose iteration count is exactly at or above 8192 (the default --unroll-count threshold) combined with a non-blocking delayed assignment to an array, causing BLKLOOPINIT to persist even when --unroll-count is adjusted

features.name: replication expression as RHS of delayed array assignment in loop
features.description: Code should include a for loop assigning a replication expression (e.g. {N{1'bx}}) to each element of an unpacked array using a delayed non-blocking assignment operator
